name: Ningirsu the World Chalice Warrior
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>星</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>杯</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>はい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>戦</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>士</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ニンギルス
desc:
2+ Link Monsters
If this card is Link Summoned: Draw cards equal to the number of "World Chalice" monsters this card points to. You can only use this effect of "Ningirsu the World Chalice Warrior" once per turn. Once per turn: You can send 1 card from each player's field to the GYs. If this card is sent from the field to the GY: You can Special Summon 1 "World Chalice" monster from your hand.

action: Sends from your field to your Graveyard
Sends from your opponent's field to your opponent's Graveyard
summoning: Requires Link Monsters as Link Materials
